title: Channel ID is undefined after creation in Slack node
symptom: After creating a Slack channel, the channel ID is rendered as 'undefined' when referenced in subsequent nodes.
applies_when: Referencing channel ID in a following node
not_this_if: Channel ID is correctly referenced in other workflows
No previous nodes have variable output
root_cause: The error occurs when the previous nodes return a different number of items than expected, leading to issues in referencing the correct output. This can happen if the workflow is not properly handling the output structure of the Slack node.
fix_steps: Locate the node where the channel ID is being referenced
Replace '.item.json' with '.last().json' to ensure the last item is accessed
Test the workflow again to see if the channel ID is now correctly referenced
agent_instruction: Change the reference from '.item.json' to '.last().json' in the node settings.
